type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding opt-in debug trace logging (debug flag, guarded DEBUG logs) to StreamListener

type: INTENT
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding idle_timeout_s param + _last_chunk_ts tracking in __init__, a timestamp refresh in receive() on non-empty chunk, and new tick(now_ts=None) method for idle-timeout termination. Will keep diff additive (new params/lines) to minimize clobber with your debug-flag changes.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Done: added idle_timeout_s/_last_chunk_ts/tick() to StreamListener, additive-only changes, patch written to patch.txt. Tests pass (tests/streaming).
